name: Cheesy Chicken Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds boned and skinned chicken breasts
recipeInstructions:
Serves approximately 6
Coat Crock-Pot with corn oil. Cook chicken on Low for 6 to 8 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours until fork tender. Stir together flour, baking powder, salt, milk, and eggs. Fold in cheese, onion, and parsley. Pour mixture over chicken and cook for 1 hour on High.
Variation: Add 10 oz package of frozen chopped broccoli to the chicken. Cook chicken and broccoli together. Then pour in cheese, flour, and egg mixture.
